license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.girbud6
title: Bradford Protein Concentration determination
author: Brian Baltzar

steps_raw.instruction: Dilute BSA using the following table. %s %s
Add 1.4 mL diluted Bradford (BioRad) Protein assay mix to each of the diluted BSA samples
Add 1.4 mL diluted Bradford (BioRad) Protein assay mix to tubes containing 30µl of the protein of interest.
Incubate for 30 min. at room temperature (Leave no longer than one hour)
Plot the OD of the BSA protein standards (Concentrations at X and OD at Y)
Calculate the concentration of the protein of interest.
